{"code":"(def merged-prs (github_pull_requests {:state "merged"}))

; Filter to only PRs that close a Linear issue
(def prs-with-linear (filter :closes_linear merged-prs))

; Get all Linear issues to check their states
(def linear-issues (linear_issues))

; Show counts
{:prs-with-linear (count prs-with-linear)
 :linear-issues (count linear-issues)}"}
